> **ID:** SLM
> **Pessoa:** Jordan Belfort
> **Co-Presenter:** David Ayad (CEO, CAG digital agency)
> **Tipo:** COURSE (10 Modules + Intro)
> **Versao:** v1.0.0
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-18

## DIFERENCIACAO vs SLSC4

| Aspecto | SLSC4 | SLM |
|---------|-------|-----|
| Foco | Sales/Persuasion (1-to-1) | Marketing (1-to-many) |
| Contexto | Phone, face-to-face, closing | Digital, funnels, traffic, copy |
| Three Tens | Applied to live selling | Applied to online marketing |
| Looping | Objection handling in calls | Retargeting/remarketing online |
| Action Threshold | Lowered via rapport + tonality | Lowered via funnels + email sequences |
| Unique to this source | — | Funnels, traffic, email, competitive intel, copywriting, hybrid marketing |

## SECOES

### Intro — Introduction
Jordan Belfort's background ($1.5B raised, 300+ companies, 50 boards). Sets stage for SLP applied to marketing.

### Module 1 — SLP Fundamentals (M1)
David Ayad introduces the Straight Line Persuasion system applied to online marketing.
- Three Tens applied online
- 4-Second Rule for digital
- Straight Line boundaries in copy
- 9-46-45 communication model (words/tonality/body language)
- SLP principles as universal (offline AND online)

### Module 2 — Online Fundamentals (M2)
Digital marketing foundation and economics.
- Paid traffic vs organic (paid always wins)
- Customer LTV economics
- The Fishing Model (WHO-WHERE-BAIT-WHAT)
- 6 landing page types
- Terminology: CPM, CPC, CTR, EPC, CPA
- Offline-to-online evolution metaphor
- Split testing methodology
- Heuristic: Frequency Cap 3-5

### Module 3 — Straight Line Copywriting (M3)
Copywriting as SLP applied to print. Most framework-dense module.
- 6-Step Sales Letter Formula (Features-Benefits-Story-Summary-Headline LAST-CTA)
- Pre-Writing Framework (4 steps)
- SLP-to-Copy Translation model
- Gary Halbert method (record best salesperson - transcribe - letter)
- Three-Second Rule online
- 3 Pain Points Rule
- Done-For-You Scripts: Forex, Hedge Fund, Solar, Stock Market
- 3 Wildly Successful Sales Letters (Brad Petersen, Parris Lampropoulos, Robert Hutchinson — image-based PDFs, minimal extractable text)

### Module 4 — Straight Line Customer Funnel (M4)
Crown jewel framework: the complete funnel architecture.
- 6-Step SLM Sales Funnel Formula (Opt-in Bribe-SLO-Core Product-Upsell-Downsell-Follow-Up)
- Golden Rule: "Whoever can spend the most to acquire a customer wins"
- Quarter-In Two-Quarters-Out model
- Break-even at SLO = success
- McDonald's funnel deconstruction
- Tony Robbins funnel deconstruction
- Exit pops convert 9/10
- One-click upsells
- Retargeting via Three Tens

### Module 5 — Traffic Secrets (M5)
Traffic acquisition mastery and channel selection.
- Dan Kennedy's Marketing Triangle (Market+Message+Media)
- Customer Avatar Template (structured fields)
- Traffic Channel Selection Framework (11 channels mapped)
- Start with Facebook
- 3-5 avatars minimum
- Solo ads strategy
- PPV (mass market only)
- CPA as vendor strategy
- Test 2-3 channels simultaneously

### Module 6 — Straight Line Email Marketing (M6)
Email as autopilot revenue engine.
- SLM Email Formula (3-email sequence: Indoctrination-Content 1-Content 2 with scarcity)
- Fill-in-the-blank templates
- Deliverability = everything
- Open rates + spam complaints = #1 factors
- Remove non-openers 30-60 days
- Goal-based automation
- Whitelist instructions
- Avoid Aweber (deliverability issues)

### Module 7 — Straight Line Looping Online (M7)
Online looping = retargeting. SLP concept translated to digital.
- SLM Online Looping Framework (7 steps)
- Three Banner Strategy (product/self/company)
- Loop Tightening Model
- Pre-Sell Pages
- Funnel Drop-Off Diagnosis
- Combination Lock Metaphor
- Deflect & Loop applied to online
- Outsource banners $5-15 Fiverr
- Frequency caps on retargeting
- Live role-play of deflection patterns

### Module 8 — Straight Line Competitive Intelligence (M8)
Data-driven market domination.
- 4 Steps to Online Domination
- Counter vs Innovator model
- 80/20 competitive intel
- Tools: SimilarWeb, Alexa, Quantcast, SpyFu, SEMrush, WayBack Machine, BuiltWith, Google Keyword Planner, MerchantWords, TowerData
- Customer Worth Asymmetry
- BCG Growth-Share Matrix reference (Bruce Henderson)

### Module 9 — Straight Line Marketing Beyond the Internet (M9)
Hybrid marketing mastery — offline channels with online integration.
- Offline-to-Online Architecture
- Newspaper ads (space ads + advertorials)
- Direct mail (3D Mail for B2B, postcards for B2C)
- Radio (buy-your-own-show Broadcast Strategy)
- TV advertising
- Dream 100 via radio interviews
- $5K+ ticket = needs phone/face-to-face
- Chet Holmes reference (Dream 100)
- Gary Halbert advertorial example

### Module 10 — Revision and Wrap Up (M10)
System recap and mastery framework.
- Unconscious competence through repetition
- The Secret Formula (WHO-WHERE-BAIT-WHAT)
- Customer value > competitor value = domination
- Full system integration

| Camada | Elementos | Exemplos |

| L3 HEURISTICS | ~46 | Frequency Cap 3-5, exit pops 9/10, remove non-openers 30-60 days, test 2-3 channels, 3-5 avatars |
| L4 FRAMEWORKS | ~25 | 6-Step Sales Funnel, 6-Step Sales Letter, SLM Email Formula, Online Looping 7-Step, Marketing Triangle |

| **TOTAL** | **~156** | |

## KEY DOMAINS (NEW to JB DNA)

Domains introduced by SLM that do NOT exist in SLSC4:
- digital-marketing
- sales-funnels
- traffic-acquisition
- copywriting (as framework, not persuasion)
- email-marketing
- retargeting
- competitive-intelligence
- customer-avatar
- landing-pages
- split-testing
- funnel-economics
- SLO-strategy
- direct-mail
- newspaper-advertising
- radio-marketing
- hybrid-marketing
- high-ticket-sales (channel threshold)
- B2B-marketing
- customer-value-optimization
- marketing-automation

## NOTAS

- SLM is the MARKETING complement to SLSC4's SALES focus
- Core SLP concepts (Three Tens, Looping, Action Threshold) are APPLIED to marketing, not duplicated
- David Ayad teaches the practical implementation; JB provides the SLP philosophy bridge
- Module 3 includes image-based PDF sales letters with minimal extractable text
- Module 4 (Funnel Formula) is the crown jewel — most actionable framework
- Module 8 tools may be dated (Alexa deprecated) but methodologies remain valid
- Module 9 unique in JB corpus — only source covering offline-to-online hybrid strategy
